rationale: In the citing article, Griskevicius et al. (2009) appears in a grouped citation in the General Discussion as part of a broad claim that some emotional appeals (e.g., romantic desire) can increase evaluations of limited-edition products. The cited work is not used to derive hypotheses, specify the proposed mechanism, or guide the empirical design and tests. The citation therefore functions as background literature positioning rather than a distinct substantive input to the paper's core argument.
